typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varFileExists as boolean (),
	VarFromAddress as string (),
	VarNonNumericCount as integer (),
	varSSISOps_944B293B6054478C9B54DAE026AE6F98_RowCount_1 as integer (),
	varSSISOps_944B293B6054478C9B54DAE026AE6F98_RowCount_2 as integer (),
	varSSISOps_DisableBIxAuditing as boolean (),
	varSSISOps_GroupNames as string (),
	VarSubject as string (),
	VarToAddress as string (),
	pkgParamBatchID as integer (),
	pkgParamDestinationConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamInterfaceID as integer (),
	pkgParamPackageID as integer (),
	pkgParamSMTP as string (),
	pkgParamSourceConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamSourceStoredProcedure as string ()
}

source(output(
		{Product Key} as string,
		Forecast as float,
		Period as string,
		{Site key} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> FlatFileSource
FlatFileSource derive({Product Key} = {Product Key}) ~> PlaceHolderSRCFlatFileSource
PlaceHolderSRCFlatFileSource derive(InterfaceID = $Package__pkgParamInterfaceID) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn derive(InterfaceID = InterfaceID) ~> PlaceHolderDESTOLEDBDestination
PlaceHolderDESTOLEDBDestination sink(input(
		Forecast as double,
		Period as string,
		Site_key as string,
		Product_Key as string,
		InterfaceID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Forecast,
		Period,
		Site_key = {Site key},
		Product_Key = {Product Key},
		InterfaceID)) ~> OLEDBDestination
